report.summary: Cycle-close v9: Zero delta since v8 — no new commits, 332 PUBLISHED_PAGES unchanged, PUBLISH_QUEUE empty, all P0 blockers carry forward, FOMC window now T-2 days (Wed Mar 18).

sections.title: QA — Page & Build Health
items: ✅ PUBLISHED_PAGES: 332 confirmed — no change from v8 (no new commits this cycle)
✅ PUBLISH_QUEUE: Empty — all queued pages promoted; no pages waiting to ship
✅ All 6 API route files present in src/app/api/: prices, defi-yields, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance
✅ TypeScript: known non-blocking errors remain in structured-data.examples.ts (4 TS1109/TS1005 errors) — same baseline as v8, ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config.ts
⚠️ Breadcrumb gap: BreadcrumbNav still missing on /learn/hyperliquid-hip3-tokenized-futures-guide, /learn/ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap, /learn/defi-options-trading-guide — carry-over from v8
⚠️ Staged deletions: src/app/badges/page.tsx, src/app/courses/page.tsx, src/app/courses/[slug]/page.tsx — still unresolved; these routes will 404 on next deploy if committed
⚠️ Local npm run build blocked by VM OOM constraint — Vercel build is authoritative; unchanged from v8
ℹ️ No new pages built or published this cycle — all QA gates pass on previously validated content

sections.title: Data Engineer — API Health
items: ✅ All 6 public API route files present and cache TTLs confirmed: /api/prices (60s/120s SWR), /api/defi-yields (300s), /api/fear-greed (120s revalidate), /api/trending (300s), /api/market-metrics (60s/120s SWR), /api/market-dominance (300s)
✅ Fallback data present on /api/prices and /api/market-dominance
✅ X-Cache-Source observability headers present on /api/prices and /api/market-dominance

⚠️ DEPLOYMENT GAP UNCHANGED: 5 of 6 routes still staged but NOT committed — only /api/market-metrics is live in production. /api/prices, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-dominance are NOT serving traffic yet
⚠️ Fallback data missing on /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics — cold-start or upstream outage yields error response
⚠️ X-Cache-Source headers missing on /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics — no cache observability on these routes
🔴 Rate limiting: 0/6 public API routes protected — checkRateLimit() still only wired to /api/health. FOMC on Mar 18 (T-2 days) — traffic spike risk is HIGH and growing
ℹ️ No API health changes this cycle; same status as v8

sections.title: DevOps — Deployment Status
items: ✅ Last deployed commit: 1b4a15e 'Fix: commit missing ecosystem + courses routes and fix stargate JSX error' — unchanged since v8, production stable
✅ next.config.ts working tree: output: 'standalone' present, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency: 4 — safe configuration intact

🔴 CRITICAL (CARRY-OVER): Staged next.config.ts still contains dangerous diff — removes output: 'standalone' and bumps staticGenerationMaxConcurrency 4→8. MUST run: git restore --staged next.config.ts before any commit
🔴 Staged deletions: badges/page.tsx + courses/page.tsx + courses/[slug]/page.tsx + courses.ts still staged — these 404 on next deploy; intent still unconfirmed
⚠️ 438 staged files remain uncommitted — same count as v8; full production gap grows each idle cycle
⚠️ Vercel trial: ~6 days remaining (down from ~7 in v8); Jefe payment action required
ℹ️ No new Vercel deployment triggered this cycle — production URL stable at last-known-good state
